blocks.html: Python is a language for talking to computers. The print() command tells the computer to show words on the screen.
Try it below — click Run Code and watch what happens!
Variables are boxes that store information. Here we make a box called name and put your name in it.

blocks.starter:
name = "Alex"
age = 10
print("My name is", name)
print("I am", age, "years old")
blocks.label: Run Code

blocks.html: Change the code above so it prints your own name and age instead of Alex's. Then add one more line that prints your favorite color!
